---
title: "Notes — TNB Frame"
---



## Interactive TNB Frame Animation

Enter $\vec{\mathbf{r}}(t)=\langle x(t),y(t),z(t)\rangle $, $a\leq t \leq b$ then click **Plot**. After showing the TNB frame, hitting **Play** will move the frame along the curve.

::: {=html}
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mathjs/13.0.0/math.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .tnb-input-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap:.4rem .6rem;
                    align-items:center; margin-bottom:.75rem; max-width:500px; }
  .tnb-input-grid label { font-family:monospace; font-size:.9rem; white-space:nowrap; }
  .tnb-input-grid input[type="text"] { font-family:monospace; font-size:.9rem;
                    padding:.35rem .55rem; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; width:100%; }
  #tnb-interval-row { display:flex; gap:.5rem; align-items:center; margin-bottom:.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  #tnb-interval-row label { font-size:.9rem; }
  #tnb-interval-row input { width:5rem; padding:.35rem .4rem; border:1px solid #ccc;
                             border-radius:4px; font-size:.9rem; }
  #tnb-plot-btn   { padding:.35rem 1rem; background:#0d6efd; color:#fff;
                    border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:.9rem; }
  #tnb-err        { color:#c0392b; font-size:.88rem; margin-bottom:.5rem; display:none; }
  #tnb-slider-row { display:none; align-items:center; gap:.8rem; margin-bottom:.5rem; }
  #tnb-play-btn   { padding:.3rem .85rem; background:#198754; color:#fff;
                    border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:.9rem; white-space:nowrap; }
  #tnb-toggle-btn { padding:.3rem .85rem; background:#6c757d; color:#fff;
                    border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-size:.9rem; white-space:nowrap; }
  #tnb-t-slider   { flex:1; }
  #tnb-t-label    { font-family:monospace; min-width:4ch; }
  #tnb-plot       { width:100%; height:520px; }
</style>

<div class="tnb-input-grid">
  <label>x(t) =</label>
  <input id="tnb-x" type="text" value="2*cos(3*t)" />
  <label>y(t) =</label>
  <input id="tnb-y" type="text" value="2*sin(t)" />
  <label>z(t) =</label>
  <input id="tnb-z" type="text" value="2*cos(2*t)" />
</div>
<div id="tnb-interval-row">
  <label>a =</label>
  <input id="tnb-t-a" type="number" value="0" step="0.1" />
  <label>b =</label>
  <input id="tnb-t-b" type="number" value="6.2832" step="0.1" />
  <button id="tnb-plot-btn" onclick="plotTNB()">Plot</button>
</div>
<div id="tnb-err"></div>
<div id="tnb-toggle-row" style="display:none; margin-bottom:.4rem;">
  <button id="tnb-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleTNB()">Show T,N,B</button>
</div>
<div id="tnb-slider-row">
  <button id="tnb-play-btn" onclick="togglePlay()">&#9654; Play</button>
  <input id="tnb-t-slider" type="range" min="0" max="1000" value="0" oninput="updateFrame(+this.value)">
  <span id="tnb-t-label">0.00</span>
</div>
<div id="tnb-plot"></div>

<script>
let _rFunc      = null;
let _scale      = 0.5;
let _axisLayout = {};          // fixed axis ranges, set once at plot time
let _rafId      = null;        // requestAnimationFrame handle
let _playStart  = null;        // timestamp when play began
let _playOffset = 0;           // slider value (0–1000) when play began
let _tA         = 0;           // interval start
let _tB         = 2 * Math.PI; // interval end

/* ── math helpers ── */
function norm3(v)      { return Math.sqrt(v[0]**2 + v[1]**2 + v[2]**2); }
function normalize3(v) { const n = norm3(v); return n > 1e-12 ? v.map(x => x/n) : [1,0,0]; }
function cross3(a, b)  {
  return [a[1]*b[2]-a[2]*b[1], a[2]*b[0]-a[0]*b[2], a[0]*b[1]-a[1]*b[0]];
}
function splitComps(raw) {
  const parts = []; let depth = 0, cur = "";
  for (const ch of raw) {
    if      (ch === "(")               { depth++; cur += ch; }
    else if (ch === ")")               { depth--; cur += ch; }
    else if (ch === "," && depth === 0){ parts.push(cur.trim()); cur = ""; }
    else                               { cur += ch; }
  }
  if (cur.trim()) parts.push(cur.trim());
  return parts;
}

/* ── numerical TNB frame ── */
function makeR(comps) { return t => comps.map(expr => math.evaluate(expr, { t })); }
function compT(r, t, h=1e-5) {
  const r1 = r(t+h), r0 = r(t-h);
  return normalize3(r1.map((v,i) => (v - r0[i]) / (2*h)));
}
function compTNB(r, t, h=1e-5) {
  const T  = compT(r, t,   h);
  const T1 = compT(r, t+h, h);
  const T0 = compT(r, t-h, h);
  const dT = T1.map((v,i) => (v - T0[i]) / (2*h));
  const Nv = normalize3(dT);
  return { T, N: Nv, B: cross3(T, Nv) };
}

/* ── Plotly helpers ── */
function arrowTrace(p, v, sc, color, name) {
  const end = p.map((x,i) => x + v[i]*sc);
  return { type:'scatter3d', mode:'lines+markers',
           x:[p[0],end[0]], y:[p[1],end[1]], z:[p[2],end[2]],
           line:{color, width:6}, marker:{size:[0,6], color},
           name, showlegend:true };
}
function axisRange(vals, pad=0.15) {
  const mn = Math.min(...vals), mx = Math.max(...vals);
  const sp = (mx - mn) || 1;
  return [mn - sp*pad, mx + sp*pad];
}

/* ── main plot function ── */
function plotTNB() {
  stopPlay();
  const errEl = document.getElementById('tnb-err');
  errEl.style.display = 'none';

  let comps;
  try {
    comps = [
      document.getElementById('tnb-x').value.trim(),
      document.getElementById('tnb-y').value.trim(),
      document.getElementById('tnb-z').value.trim()
    ];
    if (comps.some(c => !c)) throw new Error('Please fill in all three components');
    const r = makeR(comps); r(0); r(0.1);
    _rFunc = r;
  } catch(e) {
    errEl.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }

  // Read interval
  _tA = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tnb-t-a').value);
  _tB = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tnb-t-b').value);
  if (isNaN(_tA) || isNaN(_tB) || _tB <= _tA) {
    errEl.textContent = 'Error: b must be greater than a';
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }

  // Sample curve + all vector endpoints to compute fixed axis ranges
  const nPts = 1000;
  const ts   = Array.from({length: nPts}, (_, i) => _tA + (_tB - _tA) * i / (nPts - 1));
  const pts  = ts.map(t => _rFunc(t));
  const flat = pts.flat();
  const span = Math.max(...flat) - Math.min(...flat);
  _scale = span*0.25;

  // Include vector tip positions in range calculation
  const allX = [], allY = [], allZ = [];
  ts.filter((_,i) => i % 10 === 0).forEach(t => {
    const p = _rFunc(t);
    const {T, N, B} = compTNB(_rFunc, t);
    [T, N, B].forEach(v => {
      allX.push(p[0], p[0]+v[0]*_scale);
      allY.push(p[1], p[1]+v[1]*_scale);
      allZ.push(p[2], p[2]+v[2]*_scale);
    });
  });

  _axisLayout = {
    margin: {l:0, r:0, t:20, b:0},
    legend: {x:0, y:1, font: {size: 20}},
    scene: {
      aspectmode: 'cube',
      xaxis: { range: axisRange(allX) },
      yaxis: { range: axisRange(allY) },
      zaxis: { range: axisRange(allZ) }
    }
  };

  const p0 = _rFunc(_tA);
  const {T, N, B} = compTNB(_rFunc, _tA);

  Plotly.react('tnb-plot', [
    { type:'scatter3d', mode:'lines',
      x: pts.map(p=>p[0]), y: pts.map(p=>p[1]), z: pts.map(p=>p[2]),
      line:{color:'red', width:3}, name:'r(t)', showlegend:true },
    arrowTrace(p0, T, _scale, 'green',  'T'),
    arrowTrace(p0, N, _scale, 'blue',   'N'),
    arrowTrace(p0, B, _scale, 'purple', 'B'),
  ], _axisLayout);

  document.getElementById('tnb-slider-row').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('tnb-toggle-row').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('tnb-t-slider').value = 0;
  document.getElementById('tnb-t-label').textContent = _tA.toFixed(2);

  // Default to hidden
  _tnbVisible = false;
  Plotly.restyle('tnb-plot', { visible: false }, [1, 2, 3]);
  document.getElementById('tnb-toggle-btn').textContent = 'Show T,N,B';
}

/* ── frame update (called by slider and animation loop) ── */
function updateFrame(val) {
  if (!_rFunc) return;
  const slider = document.getElementById('tnb-t-slider');
  slider.value = val;
  const t = _tA + (_tB - _tA) * val / 1000;
  document.getElementById('tnb-t-label').textContent = t.toFixed(2);

  const p = _rFunc(t);
  const {T, N, B} = compTNB(_rFunc, t);
  const Tend = p.map((x,i) => x + T[i]*_scale);
  const Nend = p.map((x,i) => x + N[i]*_scale);
  const Bend = p.map((x,i) => x + B[i]*_scale);

  Plotly.update('tnb-plot',
    { x:[[p[0],Tend[0]],[p[0],Nend[0]],[p[0],Bend[0]]],
      y:[[p[1],Tend[1]],[p[1],Nend[1]],[p[1],Bend[1]]],
      z:[[p[2],Tend[2]],[p[2],Nend[2]],[p[2],Bend[2]]] },
    {}, [1, 2, 3]
  );
}

/* ── play / pause ── */
/* ── toggle T,N,B visibility ── */
let _tnbVisible = true;
function toggleTNB() {
  _tnbVisible = !_tnbVisible;
  Plotly.restyle('tnb-plot', { visible: _tnbVisible }, [1, 2, 3]);
  document.getElementById('tnb-toggle-btn').textContent =
    _tnbVisible ? 'Hide T,N,B' : 'Show T,N,B';
}

const PLAY_DURATION = 10000; // 10 seconds

function togglePlay() {
  if (_rafId) { stopPlay(); } else { startPlay(); }
}
function startPlay() {
  if (!_rFunc) return;
  _playOffset = +document.getElementById('tnb-t-slider').value;
  // If at the end, restart from beginning
  if (_playOffset >= 1000) _playOffset = 0;
  _playStart = null;
  document.getElementById('tnb-play-btn').textContent = '⏸ Pause';
  _rafId = requestAnimationFrame(animStep);
}
function stopPlay() {
  if (_rafId) { cancelAnimationFrame(_rafId); _rafId = null; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('tnb-play-btn');
  if (btn) btn.textContent = '▶ Play';
}
function animStep(timestamp) {
  if (!_playStart) _playStart = timestamp;
  const elapsed = timestamp - _playStart;
  // Map elapsed time to remaining slider distance
  const remaining = 1000 - _playOffset;
  const progress  = Math.min(elapsed / (PLAY_DURATION * remaining / 1000), 1);
  const val = Math.round(_playOffset + remaining * progress);
  updateFrame(val);
  if (val < 1000) {
    _rafId = requestAnimationFrame(animStep);
  } else {
    stopPlay();
  }
}
</script>
:::

---

## Code block (optional)

You can also include executable Python code cells if you have Jupyter installed:

```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

t = np.linspace(-3, 3, 1000)
f = np.exp(-np.pi * t**2)
xi = np.fft.fftfreq(len(t), d=t[1]-t[0])
fhat = np.fft.fft(f) * (t[1]-t[0])

plt.plot(np.fft.fftshift(xi), np.abs(np.fft.fftshift(fhat)))
plt.xlabel(r"$\xi$")
plt.title("Magnitude spectrum")
plt.show()
```
